## Liked
- The design-review flow on the new messaging platform — crisp, no rambling.

## Learned
- I default to fixing team comms myself; need to delegate drafts more.

## Lacked
- Time to think; I was reactive most of the week.

## Longed for
- One clean, uninterrupted afternoon to work on the platform strategy doc.
